Why An Online M.Com Just Works

  • 1
    Go deeper: advanced accounting, finance, taxation and research, fully online.
  • 2
    Options integrated with ACCA (UK) and CPA (US) for a global professional edge.
  • 3
    ₹90,000 for the full 2-year M.Com (₹45,000/year), with 0% interest EMI or a discount on upfront payment.
  • 4
    A UGC-entitled, NAAC A++ M.Com, recognised for jobs, teaching and further study.
